top_signals.title: Investors brace for a 'long grind' as Iran war escalation dims hopes of an early end to hostilities
top_signals.summary: As U.S. and Iranian forces continue exchanging strikes, investors are increasingly grappling with the possibility that the conflict could become more prolonged.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Public asked to help select UK wildlife to appear on new banknote series
top_signals.summary: The public are being asked to give their views on a selection of wildlife, native to the UK, that will appear on the next series of banknotes in a consultation launched today.
